componentDescription: A component to visually represent the progress of an operation or task.

shape.description: Specifies the visual shape of the progress bar, either linear or circular.

value.description: Represents the current progress value of the bar.

max.description: Defines the maximum possible value for the progress bar.

color.description: Sets the color of the progress bar's filling portion.

backgroundColor.description: Sets the background color of the progress bar's track.

height.description: Specifies the height of a linear progress bar.

size.description: Defines the overall size (diameter) for a circular progress bar.

radius.description: Specifies the radius of a circular progress bar.

strokeWidth.description: Determines the thickness of the circular progress bar's stroke.

showLabel.description: Controls the visibility of the progress percentage label.

labelColor.description: Sets the color of the progress percentage label.

animated.description: Enables or disables animation for the progress bar's changes.

animationDuration.description: Specifies the duration of the animation for progress changes.

views.description: Provides custom style overrides for different sub-components of the progress bar.
